title.en: Ye Tian searched for some years, but found noth...

content.en:
"Extradimensional Boundary Stone Fragments!"

Ye Tian was very moved, according to his understanding, this kind of extra-dimensional realm boundary stone was not only of great help to the third realm of the transcendent realm, but also to the half-step transcendent realm.

A trace of the energy of the Transcendental Boundary Stone can quickly refine the Transcendental Body.

It's just that using this kind of treasure to refine the extradimensional body of the half-step transcendent realm is undoubtedly too wasteful~.

But Ye Tian is not afraid of waste, he just wants to break through to the extradimensional realm faster!

"Not much, even if it's just a small piece - a fragment!"

Ye Tian's goal now was no longer the traces of the extradimensional rules, but to find the fragments of the extradimensional boundary stone.

But the place of annihilation of the Seven Thousand and One Territory is too big, if you perceive it roughly, the perception range of the half-step extradimensional realm is very vast, but the rough perception is useless, if you carefully perceive every inch of the void, if you want to explore this land of annihilation, countless extradimensional eras are not enough!

Why didn't those two Third Realm Extradimensional Realm powerhouses look for these fragments? Even if it takes too long, it's not worth it!

Ye Tian had also tried to deduce, but the material of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone Fragment was not something he could deduce, and all kinds of deduction, tracking, causal search and other means were useless.

If you want to find the fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone, you can only find them honestly.

Ye Tian searched for some years, but found nothing, but lost two replica bodies.

......

Polar Yang Realm.

Ye Tian entered the Peep Heaven Pavilion branch in another identity and came here to buy information.

"Is there a way to quickly find the fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone?"

He didn't think that Peeping Heaven Pavilion had a way, but he just asked by the way, and it turned out that Peeping Heaven Pavilion really had a way:

"Is there really a way?" Ye Tian was a little unconvinced!

"There really is!"

The half-step Transcendent Realm employee of the Sky Seeking Pavilion even quoted the price, "You only need to pay one billion Galanbao coins to buy these methods of intelligence, but these methods are difficult to do, if you buy the information, you can't go back." "

One billion Gala Blue Treasure Coins were nothing to Ye Tian, if he could really meet one of the methods, maybe he would be able to find the Fragment of the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone.

"Buy!"

Ye Tian directly paid one billion garnappa coins.

Soon.

The Sky Pavilion gave five ways to quickly find the fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone.

After Ye Tian finished reading it, he was directly dumbfounded.

Because the first few methods are too pitiful!

The first way: Find a fourth-realm extra-dimensional realm to help, and you can easily find the extra-dimensional realm boundary stone fragments.

"Nima, if I can find the help of a powerhouse in the fourth realm of the extradimensional realm, and I still need to find the fragment of the superdimensional realm boundary stone, isn't this a bad pen?"

Ye Tian was completely speechless.

And the second method is also very speechless.

That is, to use a high-level super-dimensional dao soldier-Sky Survey Disk to find the fragments of the super-dimensional domain boundary stone, but a high-level super-dimensional dao soldier like the Sky Survey Disk can't be moved by the general extra-dimensional realm.

Under normal circumstances, the powerhouses of the first realm can only urge low-level super-dimensional dao soldiers, the second-realm super-dimensional realm can urge medium-level extra-dimensional dao soldiers, and the third-realm super-dimensional realm powerhouses can only urge high-level extra-dimensional dao soldiers.

The most important point is that the Sky Survey Disk is too rare, and there is no such treasure in the 6000 Territory.

This is equivalent to not saying it!

The third method and the fourth method are similar to the third method, all of which use other items to find the fragments of the Boundary Stone of the Extradimensional Domain, and none of these items are available in the Six Thousand Realm.

The fifth method is to have an extradimensional creature find the fragments of the Boundary Stone of the Extradimensional Realm.

This extra-dimensional creature is the Heaven Survey Realm Snake, born in a half-step extra-dimensional realm, and can become a super-dimensional realm powerhouse when adulthood.

The point is that the Sky Survey Snake is very powerful, terrifying, and the background is very hard, and there is a third realm of extra-dimensional realm in its group, and there is more than one, who dares to provoke such a super-dimensional creature as the Sky Survey Realm Snake?

"Maybe I can copy a half-step Transcendental Realm level Sky Survey Realm Snake!"

Ye Tian suddenly became excited.

Of course, the premise is that he can see the Sky Survey Realm Serpent.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian purchased information about the Sky Survey Realm Snake from the Sky Seeping Pavilion, and learned that a super-dimensional territory had a sub-group of the Sky Survey Realm Snake, although this sub-group did not have the super-dimensional realm powerhouse of the third realm, but it had the super-dimensional realm powerhouse of the second realm, and it could contact the headquarters of the Sky Survey Realm Snake, and no force dared to provoke them.

0 for flowers0

This extradimensional territory is the 6,300 territory, and this territory is also relatively vast, and there are six extradimensional realms, but a considerable area is occupied by the Sky Survey Realm Snake.

Moreover, the Sky Survey Snake has a very serious territorial habit and will not run around casually, but other creatures entering the Sky Survey Snake territory will also be killed by the Sky Survey Snake.

"Just go to the territory of the Snake Clan in the Sky Survey Realm in the territory of 6,300 Territory. "

Ye Tian immediately went there. []

Soon.

He passed through the Realm Breaking Star Array and went to the 6,300th Territory.

......

Six thousand three hundred.

After Ye Tian arrived here, he immediately went to the Heaven Survey Realm Snake Territory, as long as he encountered a half-step Heaven Survey Realm Snake in the Transcendent Realm, he would complete the task.

He felt that this task should not be difficult, and he didn't believe that there was not a single half-step Heaven Survey Realm snake in the Transcendent Realm.

Soon.

He arrived near the Celestial Survey Snake Territory, and then let a replica body sneak in.

Not long after entering the Heaven Survey Realm Serpent Territory, he felt like he was locked.

"Discovered!"

Ye Tian was not nervous, it was just a copy of the body, and it was a big deal to be killed.

If you can see a half-step Heaven Survey Realm snake in the Transcendent Realm, then you will be fine.

However, what he ushered in was not a half-step Heaven Survey Snake in the Extradimensional Realm, but a Heaven Survey Realm Snake in the Extradimensional Realm.

This Sky Survey Realm Snake, he can't copy the other party's body.

Rumble!!!!

This Heaven Survey Realm Snake made a move, and the terrifying attack directly killed Ye Tian's copy body.

"No, the Sky Survey Realm Snake is very strict in protecting the race, once it gets close, it will be targeted by the Sky Survey Realm Snake in the Transcendent Realm, maybe the superdimensional creature with the peak realm divine cultivation is close to the copy body, maybe it will not be attacked by the Sky Survey Realm Snake in the transcendent realm. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian tried to copy the copy body of a superdimensional creature with the extreme cultivation of the peak realm god, and let this superdimensional creature copy the body into the territory of the Heaven Survey Realm snake.

Such an ant-like extradimensional creature, the Heaven Survey Realm Snake of the Extradimensional Realm is too lazy to do it.

Soon.

A half-step Heaven Survey Realm snake of the Transcendent Realm appeared.

"Finally found it!"

Ye Tian was excited.
